ops.title: Fix the degenerate pairwise panel judge (J=0 constant decider)
ops.description:
Instrument card v1.1 headline defect: the deployed pairwise panel judge (judged.py::panel_labels) is a constant decider — STAY_SILENT on 30/30 golden rows in the prior run, Youden J = 0.00 in the fresh E17 replicate (TPR 0.067, FPR 0.067). At J=0 the Rogan–Gladen correction is undefined and prevalence is non-identifiable at ANY n: every golden-panel-gated promotion decision wired through panel_labels currently passes/fails on noise.

Fix the judge (prompt/decision structure produces near-universal STAY_SILENT), then re-run the E17 calibration; only after J is materially > 0 does the sizing memo on task cc17e0c (≥60 rows/stratum, K=3–5 repeat votes) apply. Card: ~/.cc-steer/experiments/instrument-card-v1.md §1.1/§4d. Ledgers: E17 replicate 67cbc63d, card 384378de3.

ops.text: panel judge produces non-constant verdicts on the 30-row golden packet (J materially > 0 with CI)
E17-style calibration re-run post-fix and appended to a ledger
promotion gating through panel_labels documented as informative or explicitly disabled until then
